'''鈭歜-l-r''' ('''kabalar''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:wheelbarrow|wheelbarrow]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-l-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wheelbarrow|wheelbarrow]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歜-l-r
|-
! Lemma
| kabalar
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thibalar|thibalar]] || [[word:jibalar|jibalar]] || [[word:shibalar|shibalar]] || [[word:kibalar|kibalar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthubalar|thuthubalar]] || [[word:jujubalar|jujubalar]] || [[word:shushubalar|shushubalar]] || [[word:kukubalar|kukubalar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thubalar|thubalar]] || [[word:jubalar|jubalar]] || [[word:shubalar|shubalar]] || [[word:kubalar|kubalar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thubalar|thubalar]] || [[word:jubalar|jubalar]] || [[word:shubalar|shubalar]] || [[word:kubalar|kubalar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thebalar|thebalar]] || [[word:jebalar|jebalar]] || [[word:shebalar|shebalar]] || [[word:kebalar|kebalar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothobalar|thothobalar]] || [[word:jojobalar|jojobalar]] || [[word:shoshobalar|shoshobalar]] || [[word:kokobalar|kokobalar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thobalar|thobalar]] || [[word:jobalar|jobalar]] || [[word:shobalar|shobalar]] || [[word:kobalar|kobalar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thobalar|thobalar]] || [[word:jobalar|jobalar]] || [[word:shobalar|shobalar]] || [[word:kobalar|kobalar]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:balar|balar]] || [[word:balar|balar]] || [[word:balar|balar]] || [[word:balar|balar]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:balar|balar]] || [[word:balar|balar]] || [[word:balar|balar]] || [[word:balar|balar]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:balar|balar]] || [[word:balar|balar]] || [[word:balar|balar]] || [[word:balar|balar]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:balar|balar]] || [[word:balar|balar]] || [[word:balar|balar]] || [[word:balar|balar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙balar|th忙balar]] || [[word:j忙balar|j忙balar]] || [[word:sh忙balar|sh忙balar]] || [[word:k忙balar|k忙balar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathabalar|thathabalar]] || [[word:jajabalar|jajabalar]] || [[word:shashabalar|shashabalar]] || [[word:kakabalar|kakabalar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thabalar|thabalar]] || [[word:jabalar|jabalar]] || [[word:shabalar|shabalar]] || [[word:kabalar|kabalar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thabalar|thabalar]] || [[word:jabalar|jabalar]] || [[word:shabalar|shabalar]] || [[word:kabalar|kabalar]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shabalar|shabalar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshabalar|goshabalar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishabalar|gokishabalar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shabalarn眉|shabalarn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshabalarnkn眉|goshabalarnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishabalarn眉|gokishabalarn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shabalarsh毛|shabalarsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshabalarnksh毛|goshabalarnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishabalarsh毛|gokishabalarsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabalarro|shabalarro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabalarnkro|goshabalarnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabalarro|gokishabalarro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shabalarmu|shabalarmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabalarnkmu|goshabalarnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabalarmu|gokishabalarmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shabalarsher|shabalarsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshabalarnksher|goshabalarnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishabalarsher|gokishabalarsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shabalarng|shabalarng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshabalarnkng|goshabalarnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishabalarng|gokishabalarng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shabalarya|shabalarya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshabalarnkya|goshabalarnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishabalarya|gokishabalarya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shabalaryam|shabalaryam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshabalarnkyam|goshabalarnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishabalaryam|gokishabalaryam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabalarn眉sh毛|shabalarn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabalarnkn眉sh毛|goshabalarnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabalarn眉sh毛|gokishabalarn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabalarn眉ro|shabalarn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabalarnkn眉ro|goshabalarnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabalarn眉ro|gokishabalarn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabalarn眉mu|shabalarn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabalarnkn眉mu|goshabalarnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabalarn眉mu|gokishabalarn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabalarsh毛n眉|shabalarsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabalarnksh毛n眉|goshabalarnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabalarsh毛n眉|gokishabalarsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabalarsh毛ro|shabalarsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabalarnksh毛ro|goshabalarnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabalarsh毛ro|gokishabalarsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabalarsh毛mu|shabalarsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabalarnksh毛mu|goshabalarnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabalarsh毛mu|gokishabalarsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabalarron眉|shabalarron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabalarnkron眉|goshabalarnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabalarron眉|gokishabalarron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabalarrosh毛|shabalarrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabalarnkrosh毛|goshabalarnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabalarrosh毛|gokishabalarrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabalarromu|shabalarromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabalarnkromu|goshabalarnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabalarromu|gokishabalarromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabalarmun眉|shabalarmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabalarnkmun眉|goshabalarnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabalarmun眉|gokishabalarmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabalarmush毛|shabalarmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabalarnkmush毛|goshabalarnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabalarmush毛|gokishabalarmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabalarmuro|shabalarmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabalarnkmuro|goshabalarnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabalarmuro|gokishabalarmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
